Our Competencies and experience spans the entire spectrum of ICT Solutions, Education and 
Training and Outsourcing services.

Partner with Africa’s 
BPM leaders
1. Only operational BPM of East Africa in real ‘Process 
Outsourcing’ sense 
When it comes to BPO, mostly it is misinterpreted only as a 
customer service or a call center. But at Techno Brain BPO we 
provide outsourced services which are well beyond Call center and 
demonstrate we are a BPO in real sense. 
2. Strategic Partners for business enhancement
Whether it is revenue productivity challenges or customer centric project management; at Techno Brain BPM, we have one-stop 
solution from managing Business Process Re-engineering till 
managing your services which are non-core to your organisation. 
3. Tailored, quality and affordable service provider We offer specifically tailored, affordable ad high-end capacity services 
utilizing latest technology and state-of-the-art infrastructure to 
clients across the globe. 
4. Market Experience
With a combined industry experience of 15 years, strong domain knowledge and a huge pool of professionals, Techno Brain BPO 
provides clients with strategic insight, scalable and wide range of 
offerings to ensure the best Return on Investment.

years*, with more than 500 employees onboard from challenged communities

• Strategic consultants• Implementers of the Build, Operate and Transfer (BOT) model in deep rural areas

CALL CENTRE SOLUTIONS
Enterprises in the emerging markets have a growing need to deliver world-class experience to their customers. 
Most industry sectors are witnessing fierce competition and Customer Experience has emerged to be a 
primary differentiating factor. Our Call Centre Solution helps businesses to operate more efficiently, increase 
the quality of every customer interaction, create new pathways for improvement and growth. 
Techno Brain BPM, in all these years of doing businesses, we has expertise in assessing needs and features, 
designing, proposing,  installing and supporting world class contact centre solutions. 
We have a large pool of customer reference from the local market for carrying out such work, which cuts across 
various businesses and verticals. We collaborate closely, using three models, BOT (Build, Operate, Transfer), 
BOM (Build, Operate, Manage) model and outsourcing to craft campaigns that promote your brand, increase 
revenue and enhance customer satisfaction.
Key Benefits 
• Automation of customer service, telesales, promotions, surveys in one system
• Enhance business revenue by penetrating into the market through efficient communication management
• Facilitate two-way communication with the customer
• Increase customer satisfactionInbound
• Customer care & support
• Technical support
• Cross-sell and up-sellOutbound
• Customer Acquisition
• Lead generation
• Telemarketing & Promotions
